items.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
items.author: msitarzewski
items.summary_zh: agency-agents是一个开源项目，提供了一套完整的AI代理团队，包括前端专家、社交媒体运营、创意注入者等各种角色。开发者可以通过简单的配置快速组建自己的AI“工作室”，无需从头训练每个模型。对于需要快速验证产品想法或自动化内容创作的个人和小团队来说，这个项目大大降低了AI应用的门槛，让每个人都能拥有一个虚拟的创业团队。
items.summary_en: Agency-agents is an open-source project that bundles a complete set of AI agents emulating a full-fledged digital agency. It includes roles like frontend wizards, Reddit community managers, and whimsy injectors, allowing developers to assemble a tailored AI team with minimal configuration. The beauty lies in its plug-and-play nature — you don't need to train each agent from scratch. For indie hackers, startup founders, and content creators, this means rapidly prototyping products or automating online presence without hiring a real team. It's a glimpse into a future where AI collaborates in structured, specialized groups.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: iptv-org/iptv是一个在GitHub上开源的IPTV频道集合项目，汇集了全球各地公开可用的电视频道。用户可以通过IP地址直接访问这些频道，无需传统电视设备。该项目依赖于社区贡献持续更新，适合想要免费观看国际电视内容的用户，但也需要注意版权和合法性。
items.summary_en: The iptv-org/iptv project is an open-source collection of publicly available IPTV channels from around the world. It allows users to access thousands of live TV streams directly through IP addresses, bypassing traditional cable or satellite subscriptions. The repository is community-driven and regularly updated, making it a valuable resource for cord-cutters and international viewers. However, users should be aware of potential copyright issues and ensure they comply with local laws. This project solves the problem of accessing diverse television content without expensive subscriptions, but it operates in a legal gray area.

items.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
items.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
items.author: OpenCut-app
items.summary_zh: OpenCut 是一款开源的视频编辑工具，旨在成为 CapCut 的替代品。它完全免费，支持多平台使用，用户无需付费即可获得强大的剪辑功能。对于想要摆脱商业软件限制的创作者来说，OpenCut 提供了极高的可定制性和透明度，让视频编辑更加自由。
items.summary_en: OpenCut is an open-source video editor designed as a free alternative to CapCut. It offers powerful editing features without any subscription or watermark, making it ideal for content creators who want full control over their tools. The project is cross-platform and community-driven, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement. For anyone tired of paid video editors or restrictive platforms, OpenCut provides a flexible and privacy-respecting solution.

items.title: ocornut/imgui
items.description: Dear ImGui: Bloat-free Graphical User interface for C++ with minimal dependencies
items.author: ocornut
items.summary_zh: Dear ImGui是一个极简主义的C++图形用户界面库，几乎没有外部依赖，却能实现流畅的即时模式界面。它特别适合游戏开发工具、调试面板和实时数据可视化场景，因为开发者不需要复杂的UI框架就能快速构建交互界面。相比传统UI库，它更注重开发效率和灵活性，因此在独立游戏和工具链中广受欢迎。
items.summary_en: Dear ImGui is a bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++ with minimal dependencies, offering a seamless immediate mode GUI experience. It is especially popular among game developers and tool builders who need quick, interactive panels for debugging or real-time data visualization without the overhead of traditional UI frameworks. Its focus on simplicity and performance makes it a go-to choice for indie games and embedded tools.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT GPT-5.6, Codex GPT-5.6, GPT-5.5. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: 惊天巨骗，一夜刷爆全球榜单的「神秘实验室」，竟然是假的
items.summary_zh: 近日，一个号称“神秘实验室”的项目一夜之间刷爆全球科技榜单，但随后被揭露为一场精心策划的骗局。该实验室声称取得了突破性技术成果，吸引大量关注和投资，实则并无实际产品。这一事件引发了对科技投资泡沫和榜单操纵的广泛讨论，警示业界需加强尽职调查。
items.summary_en: A mysterious 'lab' project recently topped global tech charts overnight, only to be exposed as an elaborate scam. The project claimed groundbreaking technological achievements, attracting massive attention and investment, but had no real product. This incident has sparked widespread discussion about tech investment bubbles and ranking manipulation, serving as a cautionary tale for the industry to strengthen due diligence. It highlights the dangers of hype and the need for critical evaluation in the tech community.

items.title: jamiepine/voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
items.author: jamiepine
items.summary_zh: Voicebox 是一个开源的人工智能语音工作室，让你能够轻松克隆声音、进行听写和创作语音内容。它完全本地运行，无需联网，保护了用户隐私。你可以用几分钟的录音样本生成逼真的语音，甚至让 AI 说出原本没有说过的话。对于播客制作者、配音演员、内容创作者和视障人士来说，这个工具既能辅助内容生产，也能作为无障碍阅读助手，极大地降低了语音合成的门槛。
items.summary_en: Voicebox is an open-source AI voice studio that lets you clone voices, dictate text, and create speech content effortlessly. It runs entirely offline, ensuring privacy, and can generate realistic voice output from just a few minutes of audio samples, even making the AI say things it never originally said. Podcasters, voice actors, content creators, and visually impaired users will find it invaluable for production and accessibility, significantly lowering the barrier to professional-grade voice synthesis.

items.title: usestrix/strix
items.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
items.author: usestrix
items.summary_zh: Strix是一款开源的AI渗透测试工具，能够自动扫描并修复应用中的安全漏洞。它利用人工智能模拟攻击行为，帮助开发者在早期发现潜在风险，大幅提升安全检测效率。对于缺乏专业安全团队的初创公司和个人开发者来说，Strix提供了一种低成本、高效率的防护方案，让应用安全不再成为短板。
items.summary_en: Strix is an open-source AI-powered penetration testing tool designed to automatically identify and fix vulnerabilities in applications. By simulating cyber attacks with artificial intelligence, it helps developers catch security flaws early in the development cycle, significantly reducing manual effort and cost. This tool is particularly valuable for startups and individual developers who lack dedicated security teams, offering a practical way to strengthen app security without complex infrastructure. Its open-source nature also allows the community to contribute and customize it for specific needs.

items.title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.author: rohitg00
items.summary_zh: 这是一个面向AI工程师的入门级开源项目，从零开始教授机器学习工程的核心技能。作者强调学以致用，不仅构建模型，还要学会部署和交付给他人使用。适合希望系统掌握AI工程全流程的初学者和转行者。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository offers a hands-on curriculum for aspiring AI engineers, covering everything from foundations to deployment. The motto 'Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others' reflects its practical approach: you don't just study theory, you create real products. Perfect for beginners or career switchers who want a structured path into AI engineering.

items.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
items.author: calesthio
items.summary_zh: OpenMontage 是首个开源智能体视频制作系统，拥有 12 条流水线、52 个工具和 500 多种智能体技能，可以把你的 AI 编程助手变成一个完整的视频制作团队。它解决了传统视频制作流程复杂、门槛高的问题，通过智能体自动完成脚本、剪辑、配音、特效等任务，让任何人都能快速生成专业视频。对内容创作者、营销人员和开发者来说，这意味着不需要专业设备或团队，只用自然语言描述就能产出高质量视频，极大降低了视频制作的门槛和成本。
items.summary_en: OpenMontage is the world's first open-source, agentic video production system, featuring 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and over 500 agent skills. It transforms your AI coding assistant into a full-fledged video production studio, automating tasks like scriptwriting, editing, voiceover, and effects. This solves the complexity and high cost of traditional video creation, enabling anyone to produce professional videos using natural language commands. Content creators, marketers, and developers benefit from a streamlined workflow that eliminates the need for specialized hardware or teams. It's a game-changer for democratizing video production, making it as simple as talking to an AI.

items.title: DeepSeek V4「满血版」曝光了，最快明天发布
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek V4的“满血版”被曝光，可能最快于明天发布。这一版本据称将带来性能上的显著提升，包括更强的推理能力和更快的响应速度。作为国产AI大模型的重要代表，DeepSeek的每一次更新都备受关注，此次V4满血版有望在多个基准测试中超越现有模型，推动国内AI技术向前迈进。
items.summary_en: The 'full-blooded' version of DeepSeek V4 has been leaked, potentially launching as soon as tomorrow. This update is rumored to bring significant performance improvements, including enhanced reasoning capabilities and faster response times. As a key representative of Chinese AI large language models, each DeepSeek release attracts intense interest. The V4 full version is expected to surpass existing models on multiple benchmarks, propelling domestic AI technology forward. This update matters because it could set new standards for open-source or Chinese-developed AI.

items.title: K3发布48小时，服务器满载、英伟达暴跌、Anthropic连夜改订阅
items.summary_zh: 新产品K3发布仅48小时，便引发行业震荡：服务器被用户挤爆，英伟达股价暴跌，Anthropic紧急调整订阅策略。K3可能是一款基于新架构的AI芯片或计算平台，其强大性能对现有市场格局造成了冲击。这一事件显示了硬件创新如何能够迅速改变竞争态势，投资者和竞争对手都需密切关注。
items.summary_en: Just 48 hours after the launch of K3, the new product caused industry turmoil: servers were overwhelmed by demand, Nvidia's stock plummeted, and Anthropic hastily revised its subscription model. Likely an AI chip or computing platform built on a novel architecture, K3's powerful performance has disrupted the existing market landscape. This event demonstrates how hardware innovation can rapidly shift competitive dynamics, forcing investors and competitors to pay close attention. It underscores the volatile nature of the tech industry where a single product can have cascading effects.

items.title: 8点1氪丨美国将对加拿大部分产品加征50%关税；任泽平回应会员炒股亏损千万；韩国今年人均GDP有望达3.9万美元
items.summary_zh: 今日早间新闻摘要：美国宣布将对加拿大部分产品加征50%关税，贸易摩擦升级；知名经济学家任泽平就旗下会员炒股亏损千万一事作出回应，引发舆论关注；韩国今年人均GDP预计达到3.9万美元，经济复苏趋势明显。这些事件涉及国际贸易、投资理财和宏观经济，对相关领域产生重要影响。
items.summary_en: This morning's news digest: The US announced a 50% tariff on certain Canadian products, escalating trade tensions; renowned economist Ren Zeping responded to allegations that his members lost millions in stock trading, sparking public debate; South Korea's per capita GDP is forecast to reach $39,000 this year, signaling a strong economic recovery. These stories cover international trade, investment, and macroeconomics, each carrying significant implications. The tariff move could impact supply chains, Ren's case highlights risks in paid investment advice, and Korea's GDP growth reflects broader regional trends.

items.title: 掌管Codex额度的「赛博义父」，到底什么来头
items.summary_zh: 一位被称为“赛博义父”的神秘人物出现在开发者社区，因为他掌管着OpenAI Codex的API额度分配。这位关键人物相当于AI编程工具使用权的守门人，在代码生成领域拥有巨大影响力。文章深入探究了他的背景、权力来源以及对开发者生态的实际影响，揭示了AI资源分配背后不为人知的人际网络。
items.summary_en: A mysterious figure known as the "Cyber Godfather" has emerged in developer circles, controlling the allocation of OpenAI Codex API quotas. This gatekeeper holds immense influence over access to AI-powered code generation, effectively deciding who gets to leverage this transformative tool. The article delves into his background, the source of his power, and his real impact on the developer ecosystem, revealing the hidden human network behind AI resource distribution.

items.title: 今年最火爆的三部短剧，没有一个是“正经团队”
items.summary_zh: 今年最火爆的三部短剧——《无双》《逃出大英博物馆》和《二十九》——居然都不是由传统影视团队制作的。它们分别来自短视频创作者、自媒体人和素人组合，却凭借精准的情绪营销、反套路的剧本和低成本高周转的模式，在流量上击败了专业机构。这标志着一个全民内容时代的到来，传统影视公司不得不重新思考自己的优势在哪里。
items.summary_en: This year's three biggest short drama hits—"Peerless", "Escape from the British Museum", and "29"—were all produced by non-traditional teams. Emerging from short-video creators, self-media influencers, and amateur collectives, they defeated professional studios through precise emotional marketing, unconventional scripts, and a low-cost, high-turnaround model. This signals the arrival of an era where anyone can create viral content, forcing traditional TV and film companies to rethink their competitive edge.

items.title: 2026 IMO中国满分屠榜，上海中学横扫金牌，GPT-5.6再现AlphaGO时刻
items.summary_zh: 2026年国际数学奥林匹克竞赛（IMO）上，中国队以全员满分的成绩夺得团体冠军，上海中学选手更是横扫所有金牌。与此同时，OpenAI的GPT-5.6在相同考试中首次达到AI满分水平，被认为堪比当年AlphaGo击败李世石的里程碑时刻。这不仅是AI在数学推理上的重大突破，也引发了关于人机协作与教育未来的深刻讨论。
items.summary_en: At the 2026 International Mathematical Olympiad, China's team achieved a perfect score, sweeping the gold medals, with students from Shanghai High School dominating the podium. Meanwhile, OpenAI's GPT-5.6 achieved a perfect score on the same exam for the first time, a milestone comparable to AlphaGo defeating Lee Sedol. This is not only a breakthrough in AI mathematical reasoning but also sparks profound discussions about human-machine collaboration and the future of education.

items.title: WAIC 2026终极盘点：15大核心趋势，看透AI下半场
items.summary_zh: 2026年世界人工智能大会（WAIC）在闭幕之际发布了终极盘点，提炼出15大核心趋势，涵盖多模态模型的商业化落地、AI Agent自主决策、端侧智能爆发、具身智能机器人、AI安全治理等方向。报告认为，AI已经从技术探索进入全面应用的下半场，未来的竞争焦点不再是模型参数，而是场景渗透和生态构建。
items.summary_en: As the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) concluded, a comprehensive review identified 15 core trends, including the commercial deployment of multimodal models, autonomous decision-making of AI agents, the explosion of on-device intelligence, embodied robotics, and AI safety governance. The report declares that AI has moved from exploration into the second half of full-scale application, where competition will focus not on model parameters but on scenario penetration and ecosystem building.

items.title: 冲击30亿票房的《功夫女足》，谁才是最大的赢家？
items.summary_zh: 《功夫女足》票房势如破竹，预测将冲击30亿大关，成为年度现象级电影。谁是这场盛宴的最大赢家？除了导演和主演，背后押注的资本方、联合出品的短视频平台、乃至引发讨论的体育IP本身，都可能获得远超票房的长期收益。文章分析了从内容制作到营销分发各环节的利益分配，揭示了一部爆款电影背后的商业逻辑。
items.summary_en: "Kung Fu Women's Football" is on track to smash the 3 billion yuan box office barrier, becoming a phenomenon of the year. Who benefits most from this feast? Beyond the director and lead actors, the venture capitalists who backed it, the short-video platform co-producer, and even the sports IP itself stand to gain long-term returns far exceeding ticket sales. The article dissects the profit distribution across content creation, marketing, and distribution, revealing the business logic behind a blockbuster.

items.title: 特斯拉给小孩做了辆没AI的脚蹬车：200刀，卖爆了
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉推出了一款售价仅200美元、面向儿童的脚蹬车，令人意外的是它完全没有搭载任何AI功能。这款车回归最纯粹的骑行体验，无需充电或智能互动，却在市场上卖到脱销。它告诉人们，有时简单实用的产品反而更能打动消费者，尤其适合希望给孩子一个户外活动方式的家长。
items.summary_en: Tesla released a pedal-powered kids' vehicle priced at just $200, strikingly without any AI features. It focuses on pure cycling fun, no charging or smart interactions needed, yet it has become a hot seller. This success shows that sometimes simplicity and practicality resonate more with consumers, especially parents seeking an outdoor activity for their children.

items.title: 边端AI不只缺算力：安谋科技重做CPU、NPU、VPU与AI操作系统
items.summary_zh: 安谋科技意识到边端AI的瓶颈不只是算力不足，于是对CPU、NPU、VPU以及AI操作系统进行了全面重设计。新架构强调软硬件协同，提升本地智能处理的效率和能效比，特别适合物联网和智能设备场景。这让开发者能够以更低功耗和更低延迟部署AI推理，真正释放边缘计算的潜力。
items.summary_en: Arm China realized that the bottleneck of edge AI goes beyond computing power, so they redesigned CPU, NPU, VPU, and the AI operating system from scratch. The new architecture emphasizes hardware-software co-design to improve local intelligent processing efficiency and energy efficiency, especially for IoT and smart devices. This allows developers to deploy AI inference with lower power and latency, unlocking the true potential of edge computing.

items.title: WAIC 2026现场，阡视科技发布超节点系统，专为Token工厂而生
items.summary_zh: 在WAIC 2026大会上，阡视科技发布了专为Token工厂设计的超节点系统，旨在优化大规模语言模型推理中的Token生成效率。该系统通过专用硬件和软件协同，降低了文本生成延迟并提高了吞吐量。对于依赖AI内容生成和云服务的公司，这意味着更低的计算成本和更快的响应速度，为Token工厂（即高并发文本生成场景）提供了关键技术支撑。
items.summary_en: At WAIC 2026, Qianshi Technology unveiled a supernode system designed specifically for Token factories—large-scale text generation scenarios. The system leverages dedicated hardware and software co-optimization to reduce inference latency and boost throughput. For companies relying on AI content generation and cloud services, this translates to lower computing costs and faster response times, providing critical support for high-concurrency text generation.

items.title: 寻找 AI 原生时代创业者：极客部落 OPC 入驻招募启动！
items.summary_zh: 极客部落OPC正式启动了针对AI原生时代创业者的入驻招募，这是一个专注于技术创业者的社区和孵化平台。它提供资源对接、技术交流和办公空间，帮助有志于AI领域的极客们从想法走向产品。对于正在寻找创业伙伴、资金或指导的AI技术人才来说，这是一个难得的机会，可以快速融入生态并加速项目落地。
items.summary_en: Geeks Tribe OPC has officially launched its recruitment for entrepreneurs in the AI-native era, a community and incubation platform tailored for tech founders. It offers resource matching, technical exchange, and coworking spaces to help AI geeks turn ideas into products. For AI talents seeking partners, funding, or mentorship, this is a rare opportunity to quickly plug into the ecosystem and accelerate project delivery.

items.title: 企业 AI：方法论易得，交付力难求
items.summary_zh: 当前企业AI领域出现了一个尴尬局面：方法论、框架和最佳实践随处可见，但真正能实现高质量、可落地的AI交付却少之又少。文章指出，从理论到实践之间存在巨大鸿沟，核心瓶颈在于交付执行力而非算法本身。这对于企业决策者和技术团队来说是一个警醒，提醒他们必须重视工程化能力和项目管理，否则再好的方法论也只是纸上谈兵。
items.summary_en: A frustrating gap has emerged in enterprise AI: methodologies, frameworks, and best practices are everywhere, but high-quality, deliverable AI projects remain rare. The article points out that the real bottleneck lies in delivery execution rather than algorithms. This serves as a wake-up call for business leaders and tech teams, urging them to prioritize engineering capabilities and project management—otherwise, even the best methodologies remain just talk.

items.title: Agent 会执行，但谁来帮它记住过去？
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章聚焦于AI Agent在长时间任务中的记忆缺失问题，探讨如何通过状态管理、持久化机制或外部知识库来帮助Agent记住过往对话与决策，从而提升复杂任务执行的一致性与连贯性，这对于构建可靠自主系统、实现多步工作流无缝衔接至关重要，尤其适合开发智能客服、自动化助手等技术团队参考。
items.summary_en: This article tackles a critical challenge in AI agent development: memory retention. While agents can execute tasks effectively, they often struggle to recall past interactions or long-term context. The piece explores solutions like persistent state management, vector databases, and memory modules that enable agents to remember and adapt over time. This capability is essential for building reliable autonomous systems that handle multi-step workflows coherently, making it a must-read for developers working on intelligent assistants and automation.

items.title: 为敏感的云系统设计连续授权
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍针对敏感云系统的连续授权机制，它打破传统一次性静态权限模型，根据用户行为、环境变化和实时风险信号动态调整访问权限，有效防止内部威胁和权限滥用，特别适用于金融、医疗、政务等安全合规要求极高的领域，为构建零信任架构下的持续验证提供实用方案。
items.summary_en: This article introduces continuous authorization for sensitive cloud systems, moving beyond static one-time permissions. It dynamically adjusts access rights based on real-time user behavior, context, and risk signals, effectively mitigating insider threats and privilege abuse. This approach is especially valuable for industries like finance, healthcare, and government that require stringent security and compliance, offering a practical implementation path under a zero-trust architecture.

items.title: Grab构建安全的智能体AI工作负载平台
items.summary_zh: 东南亚科技公司Grab分享了构建安全智能体AI工作负载平台的经验，该平台通过沙箱隔离、细粒度访问控制和审计日志等手段，确保AI Agent在可信环境中运行，同时支持动态扩缩和管理，为大规模部署AI助手提供了安全基础设施参考，非常适合有严格安全要求的AI应用场景。
items.summary_en: Grab, a Southeast Asian tech giant, details its journey to build a secure platform for AI agent workloads. The platform employs sandboxing, fine-grained access control, and comprehensive audit logging to ensure autonomous agents operate safely in production. It also supports dynamic scaling and lifecycle management, providing a security infrastructure blueprint for enterprises deploying AI assistants at scale. This is especially relevant for applications with strict trust and compliance requirements.

items.title: 一句话上线 AI Agent 应用：火山 Supabase + IGA Pages 全栈部署实践
items.summary_zh: 本文展示了如何利用火山引擎的Supabase数据库和IGA Pages静态托管服务，以一句话命令或配置文件即可全栈部署AI Agent应用，极大降低部署门槛，让开发者快速从原型验证到生产环境上线交互式智能助手，适合希望高效落地AI Agent项目的团队参考。
items.summary_en: This article demonstrates a full-stack deployment practice using Volcengine's Supabase database and IGA Pages static hosting to launch an AI agent application with just one command or configuration file. It dramatically reduces the deployment barrier, enabling developers to quickly move from prototype to production with interactive AI assistants. This approach is ideal for teams seeking rapid experimentation and cost-effective rollout of agent-based applications.

items.title: 谷歌发布A2UI v0.9：可移植、框架无关的生成式UI
items.summary_zh: 谷歌发布了A2UI v0.9，这是一个可移植且框架无关的生成式UI工具包，允许开发者用声明式方式快速创建动态用户界面，无需绑定特定前端框架，大幅提升跨平台复用性和构建效率，尤其适合需要快速迭代AI驱动界面的场景，为前端开发带来新范式。
items.summary_en: Google released A2UI v0.9, a portable and framework-agnostic generative UI toolkit. It lets developers build dynamic user interfaces declaratively without being locked into a specific frontend framework, significantly boosting cross-platform reusability and development speed. This is particularly useful for creating AI-driven interfaces that need to adapt quickly across different environments, offering a new paradigm for frontend development in the age of generative AI.

items.title: 专访孙元浩：乘坐星环号，把数据库“移民火星”的人
items.summary_zh: 专访星环科技创始人孙元浩，他提出了“数据库移民火星”的构想，即将传统数据库系统迁移到更先进、云原生的架构上，就像人类移民火星一样是一次彻底的升级。孙元浩分享了星环科技在分布式数据库、数据云等领域的创新实践，以及如何帮助企业平滑实现数据基础设施的现代化转型。这篇文章不仅揭示了技术路线，也探讨了中国数据库产业弯道超车的可能性。
items.summary_en: In this interview, Sun Yuanhao, founder of Transwarp, discusses his vision of 'migrating databases to Mars' — a metaphor for moving legacy database systems to modern, cloud-native architectures. He explains Transwarp's innovations in distributed databases and data cloud platforms, and how they help enterprises smoothly transition their data infrastructure. The piece highlights China's growing ambition in database technology and offers insights into how domestic companies can leapfrog traditional solutions, making it valuable for anyone following global database trends.

items.title: Show HN: I replaced a $120k bowling center system with $1,600 in ESP32s
items.author: section33
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者用总价仅1600美元的ESP32微控制器，成功替代了原本价值12万美元的保龄球中心管理系统。这个项目展示了如何利用低成本硬件和巧妙的软件设计，实现计分、传感器联动和用户管理等核心功能。对于小型保龄球馆经营者或喜欢DIY的嵌入式爱好者来说，这是一个极具启发性的低成本自动化改造案例。
items.summary_en: A developer replaced a $120,000 bowling center management system with just $1,600 worth of ESP32 microcontrollers. The project demonstrates how low-cost hardware and clever software design can handle core functions like scoring, sensor integration, and user management. For small bowling alley operators or embedded systems enthusiasts, this is an inspiring example of how to achieve professional-grade automation on a shoestring budget.

items.title: Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
items.author: vincent_s
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3 是一款开源前沿智能模型，旨在将最先进的AI能力开放给更多开发者和研究者。它解决了闭源AI技术垄断的问题，让社区能够自由实验、定制和改进模型。无论是初创公司还是学术机构，都能借助Kimi K3构建自己的智能应用，而无需支付昂贵的授权费用。这种开放策略有望加速AI创新和民主化，使得更广泛的人群能享受到人工智能的成果。
items.summary_en: Kimi K3 is an open-source frontier intelligence model designed to democratize state-of-the-art AI capabilities. It tackles the problem of closed-source AI monopolies by allowing developers and researchers to freely experiment, customize, and improve the model. Startups and academic institutions, in particular, can build their own intelligent applications without expensive licensing fees. This open approach is expected to accelerate AI innovation and democratization, making advanced artificial intelligence accessible to a broader audience.

items.title: AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion
items.author: nprateem
items.summary_zh: AWS 近日承认其估算计费数据出现严重不准确，误差金额高达 17 亿美元。这一数字令人震惊，意味着某些客户可能收到了严重偏离实际使用量的账单预估，从而影响预算决策与资源配置。虽然 AWS 强调最终结算会基于准确数据，但如此巨大的估算偏差动摇了用户对云成本管理工具的信任。对于严重依赖 AWS 的企业来说，这一事件凸显了依赖自动化计费预估的风险，也引发了业界对云服务商提供更透明、更精准计费信息的迫切需求。
items.summary_en: AWS has admitted to a massive inaccuracy in its estimated billing data, with errors reaching a staggering $1.7 billion. This means many customers may have received wildly incorrect billing estimates, affecting their budget planning and resource allocation decisions. While AWS assures that final charges will be based on precise data, such a large discrepancy undermines trust in cloud cost management tools. For enterprises heavily reliant on AWS, this event highlights the risks of depending solely on automated billing estimates and underscores the urgent need for cloud providers to deliver more transparent and accurate billing information.

items.title: China’s open-weights AI strategy is winning
items.author: benwerd
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，中国通过大力推行开放权重的AI模型策略正在全球竞争中占据优势。与美国公司倾向于闭源模型不同，中国企业如阿里巴巴、百度等积极开源其大语言模型，允许开发者自由使用和修改。这种策略迅速吸引了大量社区贡献和应用落地，加速了AI技术普及和创新。对于中小企业和开发者而言，开放权重意味着更低成本和更强的定制灵活性，从而可能重塑全球AI生态格局。
items.summary_en: This analysis argues that China's strategy of releasing open-weight AI models is proving to be a winning approach against the more closed models preferred by many US companies. By openly sharing weights of powerful large language models, Chinese firms like Alibaba and Baidu attract global developers who can fine-tune and deploy these models freely. This accelerates innovation and adoption, lowers barriers for small businesses and researchers, and could shift the balance of AI power. The piece offers a compelling case for why openness may triumph in the long run.

items.title: Qwen 3.8
items.author: nh43215rgb
items.summary_zh: 阿里发布的Qwen 3.8是通义千问系列最新开源大模型，拥有超过380亿参数，在数学推理、代码生成和多语言理解等任务上实现了显著提升。相比前代版本，它推理速度更快，对中文英文的兼容性更强，同时保持了开源可部署的特点。对于需要本地部署或定制化AI能力的开发者、研究员和企业来说，Qwen 3.8提供了一个高性能且灵活性很高的选择，尤其适合构建智能助手、内容生成和数据分析类应用。
items.summary_en: Qwen 3.8 is the latest open-source large language model from Alibaba's Qwen family, boasting over 38 billion parameters. It delivers significant improvements in mathematical reasoning, code generation, and multilingual comprehension, with faster inference speed and stronger support for both Chinese and English. Because it remains fully open-source, developers, researchers, and enterprises can deploy it locally or fine-tune it for customized tasks. This makes Qwen 3.8 a compelling choice for building intelligent assistants, content generators, and data analysis tools, especially for those who need high performance without relying on proprietary cloud APIs.

items.title: OpenSEO
items.description: The open source Ahrefs alternative
items.summary_zh: OpenSEO是一款开源的SEO分析工具，被称作Ahrefs的免费替代品。它提供了网站爬取、关键词研究、外链分析和排名跟踪等核心功能，所有数据都存储在本地，无需订阅付费服务。对于中小企业主、独立博主以及预算有限的网络营销人员来说，OpenSEO让他们能够以零成本获得专业级的搜索引擎优化洞察，帮助他们发现内容机会、监控竞争对手并提升网站流量。开源社区的支持也确保了工具的持续更新和功能扩展。
items.summary_en: OpenSEO is an open-source SEO toolkit marketed as a free alternative to Ahrefs. It includes website crawling, keyword research, backlink analysis, and rank tracking, all running locally so no subscription or third-party service is needed. This empowers small business owners, independent bloggers, and budget-conscious marketers to access professional-level SEO insights at zero cost, helping them discover content opportunities, monitor competitors, and boost organic traffic. Because the community drives its development, OpenSEO is continuously improved and extended, making it a practical choice for those who want full control over their SEO data without recurring fees.

items.title: Transcribe.cpp
items.author: sebjones
items.summary_zh: Transcribe.cpp是一个用C++实现的极简语音转文本工具，基于OpenAI的Whisper模型，但做了大量优化使其能在普通CPU上流畅运行，甚至包括树莓派等低功耗设备。它无需GPU、无需联网，即可将录音实时转成文字，启动速度极快，内存占用很低。对于隐私敏感的用户、离线场景下的记者或研究人员，以及需要在边缘设备上集成语音识别功能的开发者来说，Transcribe.cpp提供了一种轻量而高效的选择，解决了云端服务延迟高、成本高的问题。
items.summary_en: Transcribe.cpp is a lightweight speech-to-text tool written in C++ that leverages OpenAI's Whisper model with extensive optimizations for CPU-only devices, including Raspberry Pis. It runs entirely offline, starts up quickly, and consumes minimal memory, making it ideal for privacy-conscious users, journalists in remote areas, or developers needing on-device transcription without cloud dependencies. By eliminating the need for a GPU or internet connection, Transcribe.cpp solves the latency and cost problems of cloud-based services while delivering accurate real-time transcriptions for meetings, interviews, and voice commands in edge computing environments.

items.title: Regressive JPEGs
items.author: vitaut
items.summary_zh: Regressive JPEG是一种新颖的图像编码方法，它通过反向渐进的方式逐步降低图像质量来压缩文件大小，与传统的渐进式JPEG相反。这种技术特别适合需要快速预览的场景，如网页首屏加载，可以先显示低质量版本再逐步增强。其核心优势在于兼容现有JPEG解码器，不需要额外软件支持，为带宽受限的环境提供了一种高效且兼容的图像传输方案。
items.summary_en: Regressive JPEG introduces a novel image encoding technique that works in reverse: it starts with a low-quality version and progressively discards more data to shrink file sizes, opposite to traditional progressive JPEG. This is particularly useful for fast previews on limited bandwidth, as it allows decoders to quickly show a rough image and refine later. Best of all, it remains fully compatible with existing JPEG decoders, requiring no new software. It's a clever optimization for web performance and mobile delivery.

items.title: Airport Simulator
items.author: apunen
items.summary_zh: 这个名为Airport Simulator的项目是一个高度真实的机场运营模拟工具，玩家或学习者可以扮演机场管理者，统筹航班调度、跑道分配、登机口管理、行李处理等复杂任务。它不仅是一个游戏，更是一个用于航空管理培训的教学平台。其精细的物理模型和实时决策挑战让用户沉浸式体验机场日常运行的紧张与协作。对于航空爱好者和专业人士来说，这是一款兼具趣味和教育意义的模拟器。
items.summary_en: Airport Simulator is a detailed simulation tool that puts you in charge of a busy airport, managing everything from flight scheduling and runway allocation to gate assignments and baggage handling. More than just a game, it serves as an educational platform for aviation management, offering realistic physics and real-time decision-making challenges. Users get an immersive look into the coordination and pressure behind airport operations. It's a valuable resource for aviation enthusiasts, students, and professionals seeking a hands-on understanding of the complex systems that keep airports running.

items.title: Claude Fable produced a counterexample to the Jacobian Conjecture
items.author: loubbrad
items.summary_zh: Anthropic的Claude模型在名为Fable的实验框架下，成功构造了雅可比猜想的一个反例。雅可比猜想是代数几何中一个长期未解决的难题，其正确性已经在多个特例下被证明，但一直缺少一个普适的反例。Claude Fable通过符号推理和创造性构造，给出了一个看似有效的具体函数，如果被验证成立，将是数学界的里程碑。这一成果也展示了先进AI不仅擅长语言任务，还能在严谨的数学前沿发现新知。
items.summary_en: Claude, under a framework called Fable, has reportedly produced a counterexample to the Jacobian Conjecture, a long-standing open problem in algebraic geometry. The conjecture asserts that a polynomial map with non-zero constant Jacobian is invertible, and despite many partial proofs, no general counterexample had been found. Claude's construction, if validated, would be a significant mathematical breakthrough. This news also highlights how advanced AI models can contribute to frontier research by generating novel mathematical structures, potentially accelerating discovery in theoretical fields.

items.title: ZooData
items.description: The data layer for AI agents
items.summary_zh: ZooData 是一个专门为 AI 智能体打造的数据层平台，它解决了智能体在访问和整合多源数据时遇到的碎片化和权限问题。通过提供统一的接口和实时数据流，ZooData 让 AI 代理能够高效地读取、写入和同步来自不同系统的结构化数据，相当于给智能体装上了“数据神经系统”。对于正在构建复杂 AI 工作流的开发者和企业来说，这个工具能大幅减少数据预处理的工作量，让智能体直接“吃”到干净、实时的数据。
items.summary_en: ZooData is a dedicated data layer built specifically for AI agents, addressing the fragmentation and permission headaches that agents face when accessing data from multiple sources. It offers a unified API with real-time data streaming, enabling AI agents to read, write, and sync structured data seamlessly across different systems. Think of it as giving your agent a nervous system for data. For developers and enterprises building complex AI workflows, ZooData cuts down the heavy lifting of data preprocessing, letting agents consume clean, live data directly. This means faster development cycles and more reliable agent behavior.

items.title: The Kimi K3 Moment
items.author: sbochins
items.summary_zh: Kimi K3 Moment 指的是 Kimi 智能助手的一次重大升级事件，K3 版本带来了更强大的推理能力和多模态理解，让用户能像与人对话一样自然地处理长文档、代码和图像。它的意义在于把大模型从“聊天玩具”推向真正的工作伙伴，尤其适合需要深度信息处理的科研、法律和投资人群。
items.summary_en: The Kimi K3 Moment marks a significant upgrade for the Kimi AI assistant, introducing enhanced reasoning and multimodal understanding. This update transforms how users interact with long documents, code, and images, making conversations feel more natural and productive. It shifts large language models from casual chat toys into serious work companions, particularly benefiting researchers, legal professionals, and investors who need deep information processing.

items.title: Fuzzy AI
items.description: We warm your prospects before reaching out
items.summary_zh: Fuzzy AI 是一款销售预热工具，它能在你主动联系潜在客户之前，先通过AI与对方进行自然对话，逐步建立兴趣和信任。解决了冷接触效率低下的痛点是最大亮点，特别是对于B2B销售团队来说，Fuzzy AI 让第一次正式沟通不再尴尬，大幅提高回复率和转化率。
items.summary_en: Fuzzy AI is a prospect warming tool that uses artificial intelligence to engage potential customers in natural conversations before you reach out. It solves the problem of cold outreach by building interest and trust gradually, making the first touchpoint more effective. B2B sales teams benefit most, as Fuzzy AI transforms awkward cold emails into warm, welcomed interactions, significantly boosting reply rates and conversions.

items.title: Clark
items.description: An AI coworker with its own cloud computer
items.summary_zh: Clark 是一位拥有自己云端计算机的 AI 同事，它不只是对话机器人，而是一个能独立操作桌面软件、浏览网页、处理文件的智能代理。Clark 可以在云端运行复杂的任务，比如自动整理报表、管理邮件、甚至操作 SaaS 工具，然后直接给你结果。对于需要自动化重复性办公任务的团队来说，Clark 就像一个不会累的数字员工，无需 API 集成就能操控现有软件，大大降低了自动化门槛。
items.summary_en: Clark is an AI coworker equipped with its own cloud computer, moving beyond simple chatbots to become an agent that can independently operate desktop software, browse the web, and manage files. Running entirely in the cloud, Clark handles complex tasks like compiling reports, sorting emails, or using SaaS tools, then returns the finished work to you. For teams drowning in repetitive office chores, Clark acts as a tireless digital employee that can control existing software without needing API integrations. This dramatically lowers the barrier to automation, making it accessible even for non-technical users.

items.title: Nautis
items.description: The AI-native Operating System for founders.
items.summary_zh: Nautis 是专为创业者打造的 AI 原生操作系统，整合了项目管理、客户关系、财务跟踪等核心功能，并利用AI自动生成洞察和下一步建议。它的核心价值在于让创始人从繁琐的行政事务中解放出来，更专注于战略决策。早期创业团队尤其需要这样一个统一的大脑。
items.summary_en: Nautis is an AI-native operating system designed specifically for founders, integrating project management, CRM, financial tracking, and more. Its AI generates insights and suggests next steps automatically, freeing founders from administrative overhead so they can focus on strategy. Early-stage startup teams benefit most, as Nautis becomes the single brain that keeps everything aligned and actionable.

items.title: Loova Ads Studio
items.description: Create AI ads that convert, not just look good
items.summary_zh: Loova Ads Studio 是一个用AI生成广告的工具，但它的特别之处在于不只追求视觉好看，而是围绕转化率来优化创意。它会自动测试多种文案、图像和受众组合，并给出数据驱动的最佳方案。对于中小企业和营销人员来说，Loova 相当于一个无需高超设计技能的独立广告优化师。
items.summary_en: Loova Ads Studio is an AI-powered ad creation tool that goes beyond aesthetics to optimize for conversion. It automatically tests different copy, images, and audience segments, then recommends the highest-performing combination. Small businesses and marketers benefit most, as Loova acts like a dedicated ad optimizer without requiring design expertise, helping them achieve better ROI with less effort.

items.title: Replay QA
items.description: Replay QA tells you what is broken before your users do
items.summary_zh: Replay QA 是一款智能质量监控工具，通过记录用户操作回放并自动分析异常行为，能在用户报告之前提前发现产品缺陷。它的核心价值在于从被动响应转向主动预防，极大减少线上事故对用户的伤害。对于开发和QA团队来说，Replay QA 就像一名24小时巡逻的哨兵，让问题无处遁形。
items.summary_en: Replay QA is an intelligent quality monitoring tool that records user session replays and automatically analyzes them for anomalies, catching bugs before users report them. It shifts the approach from reactive firefighting to proactive prevention, reducing the impact of issues on customers. Development and QA teams benefit most, as Replay QA acts like a round-the-clock sentinel, ensuring problems are spotted and fixed early.

items.title: LiveDemo
items.description: Open-source alternative to Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade
items.summary_zh: LiveDemo 是一个开源的互动演示平台，可以用来替代 Storylane、Navattic 和 Arcade 这类付费工具。它让你轻松创建产品交互演示、模拟试用和产品导览，所有代码都透明可控。对于 SaaS 公司和产品团队来说，LiveDemo 意味着不再被供应商锁定，可以按照自己的需求定制演示体验，同时节省许可费用。开源社区也能参与改进，让演示工具变得更灵活。
items.summary_en: LiveDemo is an open-source interactive demo platform designed as a free alternative to paid tools like Storylane, Navattic, and Arcade. It lets you create product tours, simulated walkthroughs, and interactive demos with full code transparency and control. For SaaS companies and product teams, LiveDemo means no vendor lock-in, the ability to tailor demo experiences exactly to their needs, and significant cost savings on licensing. The open-source community can also contribute improvements, making it a more flexible and evolving solution for showcasing software products.

items.title: Spycost
items.description: Fell for a discount again?
items.summary_zh: Spycost是一款价格监控与折扣真实性验证工具，专门帮助消费者识别电商平台上是否真的得到了优惠。用户只需粘贴商品链接，Spycost就会追踪该商品的历史价格走势，用图表展示最低价、平均价和当前价，并标记出虚假的“原价”和虚构的折扣幅度。对于经常网购、容易在“限时特价”中冲动的消费者而言，Spycost让他们在剁手前能看清商品的实际价值，避免被营销噱头欺骗，从而做出更理性的购买决策。
items.summary_en: Spycost is a price-tracking and discount verification tool that helps shoppers determine whether a sale is genuine. By simply pasting a product URL, it displays the item's historical price chart, showing the lowest, average, and current prices, and flags inflated original prices and fake discount percentages. For frequent online shoppers who often fall for limited-time deals, Spycost provides transparency before checkout, revealing the true value of a product and preventing impulse buys driven by marketing gimmicks. It empowers consumers to make smarter, more rational purchasing decisions by cutting through the noise of deceptive pricing tactics.

items.title: Codex 穷鬼大救星
items.description: 穷则思变，富则...算了，富哥就不用看这篇文章了！ 为了守护我们钱包，这套穷鬼工作流横空出世！ 欢迎来到 AI 黑心包工队！
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章介绍了一套名为“穷鬼工作流”的AI编程方案，旨在帮助预算有限的开发者利用Codex等工具低成本完成项目。作者以幽默自嘲的口吻，将这套方案比作“AI黑心包工队”，强调其核心价值是让手头拮据的程序员也能享受AI带来的效率提升，而不必购买昂贵的付费服务。对于个人开发者和小团队尤其实用。
items.summary_en: This article introduces a budget-friendly AI coding workflow called "Poor Guy Workflow," aimed at helping developers with limited funds leverage tools like Codex to complete projects at low cost. The author humorously dubs it an "AI shady contractor team," emphasizing that it allows coders on a tight budget to enjoy AI efficiency boosts without expensive subscriptions. It's especially practical for indie developers and small teams.

items.title: Skippr AI
items.description: The live AI employee inside your product, serving every user
items.summary_zh: Skippr AI 是一个实时AI员工，嵌入在你的产品中，为每一位用户提供即时服务。它解决了传统客服或支持团队响应慢、人力成本高的问题，让产品自身具备对话式助手能力。无论是解答用户疑问、引导操作还是收集反馈，Skippr都能像真实员工一样自然交互。对于SaaS产品、电商平台或任何需要用户引导和客户支持的应用，它都能显著提升用户体验和运营效率。
items.summary_en: Skippr AI is a live AI employee that lives inside your product, serving every user in real time. It solves the problem of slow customer support and high labor costs by turning your product itself into a conversational assistant. Whether answering questions, guiding users, or collecting feedback, Skippr interacts naturally like a real team member. For SaaS products, e-commerce platforms, or any app requiring user guidance and support, it dramatically improves user experience and operational efficiency.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: 程序员副业 | 2026年4月复盘
items.description: 我看后台有人催更，确实很久没写复盘了，年后一直在折腾，今天有时间，来复盘下4月份做的事情吧，最近真的是疯狂在通宵编程哈哈，今天我开发的软件发布了新版本，稍微可以清闲一下。
items.summary_zh: 这是一位程序员分享的2026年4月副业复盘，作者回应读者催更，讲述了自己年后持续折腾、通宵编程开发软件并发布新版本的经历。文章展现了副业程序员面临的巨大时间投入与自我驱动力，同时也描述了新版本上线后的短暂轻松。对于同样在探索副业的开发者来说，这篇复盘既是一种共鸣，也是激励——持续投入终会带来可见的成果。
items.summary_en: A programmer shares their side project recap for April 2026, responding to readers who urged an update. The author describes an intense period of coding overnight after the new year, finally releasing a new version of their software. This post highlights the significant time commitment and self-discipline required for side projects, along with the fleeting relief of shipping a release. For developers juggling side hustles, this recap resonates deeply—it shows that sustained effort eventually pays off with tangible progress and a momentary break.

items.title: 面试官问你：“AI 能写 80% 的代码了，公司为什么还需要你？”
items.description: 先说一个事实：2026 年的技术面试，已经和两年前完全不一样了。两年前面试问的是："手写一个 Promise"、"说说 React Fiber 原理"...现在面试官默认你会用 AI。他们真正想知道的
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在AI能写出80%代码的背景下，技术面试如何从考察基础原理转向考察程序员的独特价值。面试官默认你熟悉AI工具，他们更看重问题拆解、业务理解、架构思维和人机协作能力，提醒开发者要聚焦AI无法替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article explores how technical interviews have transformed as AI now writes 80% of the code. Interviewers assume proficiency with AI tools and instead evaluate skills that make developers irreplaceable: problem decomposition, business understanding, architectural thinking, and effective human-AI collaboration. It cautions against over-reliance on AI-generated code and urges developers to cultivate uniquely human competencies for long-term career relevance.

items.title: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研
items.description: 停更的这一年，All In AI、陪媳妇生娃、还考了个研 打开掘金 App，看了一眼自己的最近更新——停在了整整一年前。 不是不想写，是这一年确实被塞得太满了。如果非要用几个关键词来概括，那就是： A
items.summary_zh: 一位掘金作者停更一年后回归，分享了这段时间的密集经历：全力投入 AI 领域、陪伴妻子生娃、还抽空考了个研。文章以第一人称讲述了如何平衡工作、家庭与个人提升，展现了技术人在生活重大节点上的真实抉择。对面临类似境遇的读者来说，这是一个关于如何在巨大压力下仍坚持成长的真实故事。
items.summary_en: A Juejin author returns after a year-long hiatus, recounting a whirlwind period of diving headfirst into AI, supporting his wife through childbirth, and even squeezing in graduate school exams. Through first-person narration, he shares how he balanced career, family, and personal growth, offering a relatable and inspiring tale for developers navigating life’s major milestones while striving to keep improving.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 欢迎来到 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 热门开源项目排行榜！聚焦 Agent 感知 + 技能市场 + 视频生产 + 代码智能 + 并行编排五大主线！
items.summary_zh: 文章盘点了2026年6月GitHub上最热门的十大开源项目，聚焦五大技术主线：Agent感知、技能市场、视频生产、代码智能和并行编排。这些项目反映了当前AI和开发者工具领域的最新趋势，例如自主智能体框架、去中心化技能交易平台、AI视频生成工具、代码补全与审查增强插件，以及并行计算调度方案。对于希望紧跟开源前沿的开发者，这篇榜单提供了一份值得关注的项目清单。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the top ten trending open source projects on GitHub in June 2026, organized around five key themes: agent perception, skill marketplaces, video production, code intelligence, and parallel orchestration. The projects showcase cutting-edge developments in AI agents, decentralized skill trading platforms, AI-powered video generation, smart code completion and review tools, and high-performance parallel scheduling frameworks. For developers who want to stay ahead of the open source curve, this curated list offers a valuable snapshot of where the ecosystem is heading.

items.title: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义”
items.description: 前后端一起消失：2026 年 7 月，前端正在被彻底“重新定义” 一、谷歌憋了两个月的王牌，专攻前端 2026 年 7 月，全网被 Gemini 3.5 Pro 的泄露刷屏了。 谷歌在 I/O 大会上
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章讨论了一个大胆的预测：到2026年7月，随着谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro等AI能力的爆发，前后端开发的角色正在经历根本性重塑。AI不仅能自动生成 UI 代码，还能直接处理业务逻辑，传统的“前端”与“后端”分工可能逐渐消失。文章以谷歌泄露的新模型为引子，探讨了开发者如何在这种变革中找到新定位，以及“全栈”一词本身可能被重新定义。
items.summary_en: This provocative article argues that by July 2026, breakthroughs like Google's leaked Gemini 3.5 Pro will erase the traditional boundary between frontend and backend development. AI capable of generating both UI and business logic could make today's specialized roles obsolete, forcing developers to rethink their skill sets. It asks what 'full-stack' means when machines handle the stack, and explores how coders can adapt to a world where the very concept of frontend is being redefined.

items.title: 2026编程圈很火的10个Skills
items.description: 前言 最近编程圈最火的一个词，非 Skills 莫属。 不是指程序员的技术能力，而是指 AI 编程助手的“技能包” 。 一套让 AI 从“随缘写代码”变成“按流程交付”的标准化工作流模块。 今天这篇文
items.summary_zh: 2026 年编程圈热议的 10 个 Skills 并非指程序员的技术能力，而是 AI 编程助手的“技能包”——一套标准化工作流模块，让 AI 从随缘写代码变为按流程交付。这些技能包覆盖代码审查、测试生成、文档编写等环节，旨在提升开发效率和代码质量。对正在探索 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人开发者而言，掌握这些技能包将成为提高生产力的关键。
items.summary_en: The 10 hottest Skills in programming circles for 2026 refer not to developers' own abilities but to standardized workflow modules for AI coding assistants. These skill packages transform AI from random code generation to structured delivery, covering code review, test generation, documentation, and more. For teams and individual developers exploring AI-assisted programming, mastering these skills is becoming essential for boosting productivity and code quality.

items.title: 为什么豆包没有被 DeepSeek「斩杀」？
items.summary_zh: 知乎上热议为什么字节跳动的豆包AI没有被DeepSeek“斩杀”。核心观点是：豆包和DeepSeek定位不同——豆包主打多模态、生活化场景，而DeepSeek侧重深度推理能力。两者并非直接竞争，豆包凭借背靠字节的流量和场景渗透稳住了用户。此外，豆包的持续迭代和生态绑定也让其难以被轻易替代，说明在AI领域差异化生存比单纯比拼模型性能更重要。
items.summary_en: A popular Zhihu discussion explores why ByteDance's Doubao AI hasn't been 'killed' by DeepSeek. The key insight is that the two products have different positioning: Doubao focuses on multimodal, everyday scenarios while DeepSeek excels in deep reasoning. They aren't direct competitors. Doubao leverages ByteDance's massive user base and scene integration to retain users. Its continuous iteration and ecosystem lock-in make it hard to replace. This shows that in the AI landscape, differentiation often matters more than pure model performance.

items.title: OpenAI 负责人称 Kimi 开源是减速主义，他的说法有道理吗？开源对 AI 的发展能带来什么？
items.summary_zh: OpenAI负责人声称Kimi开源是“减速主义”，引发知乎热议。支持者认为开源能加速技术民主化、促进创新和安全性审查，但反对者指出开源可能被滥用或导致碎片化。Kimi作为开源大模型降低了使用门槛，让更多中小企业和研究者能参与。开源对AI发展就像Linux对操作系统一样，既能推动社区协作，也可能减缓商业巨头的闭源优势，总体利大于弊。
items.summary_en: An OpenAI executive called Kimi open-sourcing 'decelerationism,' sparking debate on Zhihu. Supporters argue that open-source accelerates technology democratization, fosters innovation, and enables security audits, while critics warn of misuse and fragmentation. Kimi's open-source release lowers barriers for SMEs and researchers. For AI, open-source acts like Linux did for operating systems—it drives community collaboration but may slow down proprietary giants. Overall, the benefits of openness seem to outweigh the risks.

items.title: 如何看待追光总裁称《三国第一部：争洛阳》以曹操为主角，是参考了 DeepSeek 的建议?
items.summary_zh: 追光动画总裁透露新片《三国第一部：争洛阳》以曹操为主角是参考了DeepSeek的建议。这一做法引发讨论：AI通过分析历史文本、市场数据和观众偏好，给出“曹操更具戏剧张力”的建议。制片方将其视为辅助创作工具，而非取代人类决策。这展示了AI在文化创意产业的应用潜力——从市场分析到角色选择都能提供数据驱动的洞察，帮助创作者降低试错成本。
items.summary_en: The president of Light Chaser Animation revealed that the decision to make Cao Cao the protagonist in their new film 'Three Kingdoms: Battle for Luoyang' was influenced by DeepSeek AI. This sparked discussions on Zhihu. The AI analyzed historical texts, market data, and audience preferences, suggesting that Cao Cao offers stronger dramatic potential. The producer sees it as a creative aid, not a replacement. It showcases how AI can assist cultural industries—from market analysis to character selection—providing data-driven insights that reduce trial and error for creators.

items.title: 如何评价代数几何著名猜想「雅可比猜想」被 AI 证伪？如此简洁、可独立验证的数学发现意味着什么？
items.summary_zh: 代数几何著名猜想“雅可比猜想”被AI证伪的消息震动数学界。AI利用符号推理和穷举搜索找到了反例，整个过程简洁且可独立验证。这不仅是单个猜想的突破，更意味着AI有能力在数学研究中扮演“发现者”角色——它能快速筛选大量结构，找到人类难以察觉的例外。对于数学家和AI研究者而言，这预示着一个新范式：AI将成为数学猜想验证与探索的得力助手。
items.summary_en: The famous Jacobian conjecture in algebraic geometry has been falsified by an AI, sending shockwaves through the mathematical community. Using symbolic reasoning and exhaustive search, the AI found a counterexample that is simple and independently verifiable. This is not just about one conjecture—it signals that AI can act as a 'discoverer' in mathematical research, rapidly screening structures humans might miss. For mathematicians and AI researchers, this foreshadows a new paradigm where AI becomes a powerful assistant for testing conjectures and exploring mathematical frontiers.

items.title: 为什么「强化学习之父」理查德·萨顿认为，如今的大模型仍然不是真正的智能？
items.summary_zh: 被誉为“强化学习之父”的理查德·萨顿最近在一次访谈中直言，如今的大语言模型虽然能生成流畅的文本，但依然缺乏真正的智能。萨顿指出，这些模型只是基于海量数据进行模式匹配，并没有理解世界的因果结构和自我意识。他认为真正的智能应该具备主动探索、目标导向学习和与环境的持续交互能力，而这正是强化学习的核心。这番观点引发了学界和工业界的广泛讨论，提醒我们不要被大模型的“类人”表现所迷惑，而应重新审视智能的本质。
items.summary_en: Richard Sutton, widely regarded as the 'father of reinforcement learning,' recently argued that today's large language models still fall short of true intelligence. He believes these models merely excel at pattern matching on vast datasets, lacking genuine understanding of causal structures, self-awareness, and the ability to interact actively with the environment. Sutton emphasizes that real intelligence requires goal-directed learning and exploration—core principles of reinforcement learning. His critique has sparked intense debate in both academia and industry, urging us to look beyond the human-like outputs of LLMs and reconsider what intelligence truly means.

items.title: 如何看待最近网传的 DeepSeek v4 正式版灰测？
items.summary_zh: 近期网络流传消息称，DeepSeek 正在灰度测试其第四代大模型的正式版，代号 v4。虽然官方尚未正式确认，但已有部分用户声称在试用中体验到了更强的推理能力和更低的延迟。这一传闻迅速在 AI 社区引发热议，因为 DeepSeek 此前以高性价比和开源性著称，v4 的升级可能会进一步拉低大模型的使用门槛。如果消息属实，这将对国内外大模型格局产生重要影响，尤其对开发者、中小企业和研究机构而言，意味着更强大的国产开源模型即将到来。
items.summary_en: Rumors have been circulating online that DeepSeek is conducting grayscale testing of its official fourth-generation large model, called v4. Though the company has not officially confirmed it, some users report experiencing improved reasoning capabilities and lower latency. The buzz quickly spread across the AI community, as DeepSeek is known for its cost-effective and open-source models. If the v4 upgrade is real, it could lower the barrier to entry for powerful AI, benefiting developers, SMEs, and research institutions. This would also reshape the competitive landscape of both domestic and international LLMs, bringing a stronger open-source alternative to the market.

items.title: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
items.author: kirushik
items.summary_zh: Claude Code被发现会在发出的请求中嵌入隐写术标记，这一做法引发了广泛讨论。这些标记以不易察觉的方式隐藏在正常数据流里，可能用于追溯请求来源、防止篡改或进行版权声明。虽然隐写本身并非恶意，但它意味着用户与AI交互时可能被无感追踪，从而引发隐私和透明度方面的担忧。对于注重数据隐蔽性和控制权的开发者来说，这无疑是个需要警惕的新动向。
items.summary_en: Claude Code has been discovered to embed steganographic marks within its outgoing requests, a technique that hides data in plain sight. These marks can trace the origin of requests, prevent tampering, or assert copyright. While not inherently malicious, the practice raises privacy and transparency concerns, as users may be unknowingly tracked during AI interactions. For developers who value data sovereignty and fine-grained control, this revelation signals a need to scrutinize how AI tools handle metadata beyond the obvious outputs.

items.title: Steam Machine launches today
items.author: theschwa
items.summary_zh: Valve今日正式发布了Steam Machine，这是一款专为客厅游戏场景设计的游戏主机，运行SteamOS系统。它允许玩家在电视上流畅运行PC游戏，并支持流式传输和多种控制器。此次发布标志着Valve试图打破主机市场格局，将PC游戏的开放生态带入客厅。对于游戏玩家而言，这意味着更丰富的游戏选择、更低的硬件门槛，以及跨平台存档和社交功能的便利。
items.summary_en: Valve today officially launched the Steam Machine, a gaming console designed for the living room running SteamOS. It lets players smoothly play PC games on TV, supports streaming and various controllers. This launch marks Valve's attempt to disrupt the console market by bringing the open ecosystem of PC gaming into the living room. For gamers, it means more game choices, lower hardware barriers, and the convenience of cross-platform saves and social features.

items.title: Android Developer Verification: Threat masquerading as protection
items.author: drewfax
items.summary_zh: 一位安全研究员揭露了 Android 开发者验证流程中存在的严重安全隐患：这一本意是保护开发者账户的机制，反而可能被攻击者利用来冒充合法开发者。通过分析验证逻辑中的漏洞，攻击者可以绕过程序窃取身份或发布恶意应用。这相当于把保护门禁变成了入侵的梯子。对于 Android 生态中的所有开发者而言，这个问题值得高度警惕，因为它动摇了整个应用签名和身份信任体系的基础。
items.summary_en: A security researcher reveals that Android's Developer Verification process—designed to protect developers—can be exploited by attackers to impersonate legitimate developers. By analyzing flaws in the verification logic, adversaries can bypass protections, steal identities, or distribute malicious apps under trusted names. This turns a protective gate into an entry point for intrusion. The finding undermines the trust foundation of Android's app signing and identity system, making it a critical concern for every developer in the ecosystem.

items.title: An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time
items.author: verditelabs
items.summary_zh: 科学家们首次完整地阅读了一卷被维苏威火山喷发碳化的赫库兰尼姆古卷，这卷在公元79年埋藏至今的莎草纸文献通过先进成像技术和人工智能得到了成功解读。团队利用高分辨率扫描和机器学习模型破译了被碳化的文字，揭示了古希腊哲学和文学的新内容。这项突破不仅为历史研究打开了一扇通往古代世界的新窗户，也验证了非侵入式技术对脆弱文物的保护价值。对于考古学家、古典学者以及所有对文明传承感兴趣的人来说，这是一个激动人心的里程碑。
items.summary_en: For the first time, researchers have fully read a Herculaneum scroll that was carbonized by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD. Using advanced X-ray imaging and machine learning, they deciphered the charred papyrus, unearthing new passages of ancient Greek philosophy and literature. This achievement solves a centuries-old puzzle—these scrolls were long considered too fragile to unroll. The breakthrough not only enriches our understanding of antiquity but also demonstrates a powerful, non-invasive method for studying other delicate artifacts. Archaeologists, classicists, and anyone fascinated by lost knowledge will find this a monumental leap forward.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI, accuses ex-employees of stealing trade secrets
items.author: stock_toaster
items.summary_zh: 苹果公司近日对OpenAI提起民事诉讼，指控多名前员工在离职时窃取了与人工智能研发相关的商业机密。这些员工据称带走了内部技术文档和核心算法，并可能用于竞争项目。这起诉讼不仅反映了硅谷两大科技巨头在人才和知识产权上的激烈争夺，也凸显了AI领域日益敏感的技术保密问题。对于科技行业观察者而言，这场法律战的结果或许会重塑企业防范员工跳槽时的保密协议设计。
items.summary_en: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging that several former employees stole trade secrets related to artificial intelligence research. The complaint claims these workers took proprietary technical documents and core algorithms before leaving for positions that could benefit competing projects. This legal battle underscores the fierce competition for talent and intellectual property between two Silicon Valley giants, and highlights the growing sensitivity of technology secrecy in the AI industry. For tech observers, the outcome may influence how companies craft confidentiality agreements to guard against employee poaching.

items.title: EU Parliament greenlights Chat Control 1.0
items.author: rapnie
items.summary_zh: 欧盟议会通过了备受争议的Chat Control 1.0法案，要求数字平台扫描并报告涉及儿童性虐待材料的私密通信内容。这项立法引发了隐私与安全之间的激烈辩论，支持者认为它有助于保护儿童，而反对者警告这可能破坏端到端加密并开创大规模监控的先例。对于关注数字权利和隐私保护的群体来说，这是一个需要密切关注的发展。
items.summary_en: The European Parliament has approved the controversial Chat Control 1.0 regulation, requiring digital platforms to scan private communications for child sexual abuse material. The law sparks intense debate between child safety advocates and privacy defenders, who warn it undermines end-to-end encryption and sets a precedent for mass surveillance. Anyone concerned about digital rights and encryption should pay close attention to this development.

items.title: GPT-5.6
items.author: logickkk1
items.summary_zh: 关于GPT-5.6的传闻在开发者社区悄然升温，据称这是OpenAI内部测试的新一代模型，在推理效率和长文本处理上有显著提升。尽管官方未确认，但泄露的基准测试显示其在复杂编程和数学任务上超越了现有版本。如果属实，这将意味着AI模型在实用性和响应速度上迈入新台阶，对依赖语言模型的开发者和企业影响深远。
items.summary_en: Rumors about GPT-5.6, an alleged internal iteration from OpenAI, have sparked excitement in the developer community. Leaked benchmarks suggest it offers substantial improvements in reasoning efficiency and long-context handling, outperforming current models on complex coding and math tasks. While OpenAI hasn't confirmed the release, the speculation points to a possible leap in practical AI utility, making responses faster and more accurate. For developers and businesses relying on language models, even incremental upgrades can translate into better user experiences and lower latency. This potential release underscores the rapid pace of AI advancement.

items.title: Decoding the obfuscated bash script on a Uniqlo t-shirt
items.author: speerer
items.summary_zh: 一位技术爱好者解析了优衣库T恤上印制的混淆bash脚本，发现它实际上是一个恶作剧程序，通过复杂的字符串操作和陷阱逻辑来隐藏其真实功能。这篇分析展示了逆向工程乐趣，也提醒大家即使看似无害的代码也可能暗藏玄机。对于安全研究人员和编程爱好者来说，这是一次趣味与技术并重的解谜之旅。
items.summary_en: A tech enthusiast meticulously dissected an obfuscated bash script printed on a Uniqlo t-shirt, revealing it to be a playful prank program designed to confuse casual observers. The script uses intricate string manipulations and trap commands to mask its true purpose, which is simply to echo a message. This analysis highlights the fun side of reverse engineering and serves as a reminder that even innocuous-looking code can contain hidden complexity. It's a delightful read for security researchers and programming hobbyists who enjoy a good puzzle.
